name: Seducing Drake Palma
overview: With over 125 million reads on Wattpad, this hit story follows Alys, a bubbly girl who agrees to seduce the mysterious Drake Palma to help her best friend. But as their pretend relationship starts to feel real, Alys is torn between loyalty and unexpected love.

trailers.title: SEDUCING DRAKE PALMA TRAILER | Studio Viva
